en_title: Working With Harry Potter Child Actors is 'Brutal,' HBO Cinematographer Says, Because They Have to Mostly Attend School
cn_title: HBO《哈利·波特》童星每天仅能拍约90分钟
subtitle: 课业挤压拍摄

paragraphs.en: Working with child actors on HBO's Harry Potter TV series is a "brutal" experience, the show's cinematographer has said, as the young stars have to spend most of their time off set, in school classes.
paragraphs.cn: HBO《哈利·波特》剧集摄影指导表示，与童星合作的经历十分「残酷」，因为这些年轻演员大部分离开片场的时间都要在课堂上度过。

paragraphs.en: With only a limited amount of time available for filming each day, child actors such as the new Harry Potter actor Dominic MacLaughlin can only shoot so much material — forcing crew to squeeze in as much as possible when they are around.
paragraphs.cn: 每天可用于拍摄的时间有限，新任Harry Potter演员Dominic MacLaughlin等童星只能完成有限的素材，剧组不得不在他们到场时尽可能塞入更多拍摄任务。

paragraphs.en: It's a situation that veteran director of photography Adriano Goldman has discussed in detail with YouTuber Andre Pilli , where he revealed that McLaughlin and co. could only be on set for about "an hour and a half" each day.
paragraphs.cn: 资深摄影指导Adriano Goldman与YouTube博主Andre Pilli详细谈到了这种情况。他透露，MacLaughlin等童星每天只能在片场停留大约「一个半小时」。

paragraphs.en: "You have to shoot really fast, and the faster you go, the more you compromise quality," Goldman said of having to rush to make the most of the young actors' limited time. "There's no way around it, right? Obviously, we have a lot of resources, but it's brutal."
paragraphs.cn: 谈到必须赶拍、充分利用童星有限的时间时，Goldman说：「你必须拍得非常快，而速度越快，画质就越容易妥协。没有办法避开这个问题，对吧？我们显然拥有大量资源，但拍摄真的很残酷。」

paragraphs.en: "The kids screen time is really brutal," Goldman continued, noting that he was tasked with working up to "six setups" during a daily filming stint.
paragraphs.cn: Goldman继续说道：「孩子们可供拍摄的时间真的非常残酷。」他还提到，自己每天的拍摄时段最多要完成「6组机位设置」。

paragraphs.en: "So the methodology is very specific," he added. "You practically have to pre-shoot all the scenes while they're in class. It's really hard; you shoot everything out of order, because of that kind of scheduling. So the process is really complicated, but I've done one now."
paragraphs.cn: 他补充道：「所以工作方法非常特殊。孩子们上课时，你几乎得把所有场景都先预拍一遍。真的很难；由于这种日程安排，所有内容都得打乱顺序拍摄。因此整个过程非常复杂，不过我现在已经完成了一季。」

paragraphs.en: Last year, it was reported that HBO's enormous Harry Potter production would include the construction of a temporary school within the series' base at Warner Bros. Studios Leavesden, which could house as many as 600 pupils. Cast members have used the site to attend classes alongside filming duties, with around 150 children attending daily lessons, and space for up to quadruple this amount at peak periods.
paragraphs.cn: 去年有报道称，HBO规模庞大的《哈利·波特》剧组将在华纳兄弟利维斯登工作室的制作基地内建造一所临时学校，最多可容纳600名学生。演员们在履行拍摄任务的同时，也会在这里上课；每天约有150名儿童就读，高峰期可容纳人数则达到这一数字的4倍。

paragraphs.en: The need to juggle filming with school time was also a consideration for the stars of the previous Harry Potter films — but the creation of a temporary school goes further, and speaks to the enormous size of the TV show's production, which is due to feature a cast of hundreds and last for the next decade.
paragraphs.cn: 此前《哈利·波特》电影的主演同样需要平衡拍摄与上学时间，但专门兴建一所临时学校更进一步，也体现了这部剧集制作规模之庞大。该剧计划启用数百名演员，并持续制作未来十年。

paragraphs.en: The school is believed to be open from 5.30am each morning until 8.30pm, in order to fit studies around day and night filming. According to planning application documents seen by the BBC, the school will be in place "for the next 8-10 years" but be dismantled afterwards.
paragraphs.cn: 据称，这所学校每天早上5.30（5点30分）开放至晚上8.30（8点30分），以便围绕日间和夜间拍摄安排课程。BBC查阅的规划申请文件显示，学校将在「未来8至10年」保留，之后拆除。

paragraphs.en: Could the series just take longer to shoot each season? Unfortunately, HBO would likely argue it does not have that luxury. Already, fans believe that the series' pace (which won't see a new season every year) will likely mean that the show is on air into the early 2040s, and HBO will almost certainly be wary of allowing its young stars to age too far beyond their on-screen characters. Time, therefore, is of the essence.
paragraphs.cn: 剧集能否每季多花些时间拍摄？遗憾的是，HBO很可能会说自己没有这种余裕。粉丝已经认为，这部剧不会每年推出新一季，照此节奏可能要播到2040年代初；HBO几乎肯定也不愿让年轻主演的实际年龄远超剧中角色。因此，时间至关重要。

paragraphs.en: Goldman previously served as director of photography on the second season of Disney+ hit Andor, as well as 28 episodes of Netflix drama The Crown. Goldman will next head back on set for Harry Potter's second season of episodes, which begin filming later this year . HBO is set to premiere the first season this Christmas.
paragraphs.cn: Goldman此前担任Disney+热门剧集《安多》第二季摄影指导，也参与了Netflix剧集《王冠》28集的拍摄。接下来，他将回到《哈利·波特》第二季片场，该季会在今年晚些时候开拍。HBO计划于今年圣诞节首播第一季。

summary: HBO《哈利·波特》摄影指导Adriano Goldman称，童星每天大约只能在片场拍摄90分钟，剧组必须趁他们上课时预拍场景。片场临时学校将运行8至10年，可容纳最多600名学生。
opus_summary: HBO《哈利·波特》童星每天大约只能拍摄90分钟，其余时间需上课。剧组因此要预拍场景、打乱顺序赶工；华纳片场还搭建了一所最多容纳600人的临时学校。

translated_terms.Warner Bros. Studios Leavesden: 华纳兄弟利维斯登工作室
